notes:
🚀 v35.4 - OBD Scope Optimization & Renogy Hardening (v51)

✅ OBD: Disables non-functional Mode 01/09 auto-polling for EDC16 ECU.
✅ OBD: Optimized 'Collect All' (removes identity/module scan, saving ~100s).
✅ OBD: Fixed ATCS probe bug in module scan causing ghost responses.
✅ RENOGY: Dynamic temp sensor display based on probe count (reg 5017).
✅ RENOGY: Stabilized battery queries with writeWithoutResponse to fix GATT errors.
